parameters.name: clampinput
parameters.label: Clamp Input
parameters.description: This option will clamp pixel values in between 0 and 1. When using higher bit depth floating pixel formats, it is recommended to set it to Unclamped to allow the full range of values to be operated on

parameters.name: invert
parameters.label: Invert
parameters.description: Inverts the colors in the image. Black becomes white, white becomes black. Colors invert across the color wheel, so red becomes cyan, blue becomes yellow, green becomes magenta, and so on.

parameters.name: blacklevel
parameters.label: Black Level
parameters.description: Any pixel with a value less than or equal to this will be black.

parameters.name: brightness1
parameters.label: Brightness 1
parameters.description: Increases or decreases the brightness of an image. Brightness can be considered the arithmetic mean of the RGB channels. The Brightness parameter adds or subtracts an offset into the R, G, and B chann

parameters.name: gamma1
parameters.label: Gamma 1
parameters.description: The Gamma parameter applies a gamma correction to the image. Gamma is the relationship between the brightness of a pixel as it appears on the screen, and the numerical value of that pixel. This is oft

parameters.name: contrast
parameters.label: Contrast
parameters.description: Contrast applies a scale factor (gain) to the RGB channels. Increasing contrast will brighten the light areas and darken the dark areas of the image, making the difference between the light and dark a

parameters.name: inlow
parameters.label: In Low
parameters.description: Any pixel below this value appears black.

parameters.name: inhigh
parameters.label: In High
parameters.description: Any pixel above this value appears white.

parameters.name: outlow
parameters.label: Out Low
parameters.description: Clamps pixel values to this value or higher.

parameters.name: outhigh
parameters.label: Out High
parameters.description: Clamps pixel values to this value or lower.

parameters.name: lowr
parameters.label: Low R
parameters.description: Clamps the minimum level of the red channel.

parameters.name: highr
parameters.label: High R
parameters.description: Clamps the maximum level of the red channel.

parameters.name: lowg
parameters.label: Low G
parameters.description: Clamps the minimum level of the green channel.

parameters.name: highg
parameters.label: High G
parameters.description: Clamps the maximum level of the green channel.

parameters.name: lowb
parameters.label: Low B
parameters.description: Clamps the minimum level of the blue channel.

parameters.name: highb
parameters.label: High B
parameters.description: Clamps the maximum level of the blue channel.

parameters.name: lowa
parameters.label: Low A
parameters.description: Clamps the minimum level of the alpha channel.

parameters.name: higha
parameters.label: High A
parameters.description: Clamps the maximum level of the alpha channel.

parameters.name: stepping
parameters.label: Apply Stepping
parameters.description: Turns on stepping (posterizing) and enables the parameters below.

parameters.name: stepsize
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: Posterizes the image into bands or stripes. Number of bands equal to the inverse of this parameter (i.e., 0.25 = 4 bands). Use a default Ramp to easily see this parameter's effect.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.label: Threshold
parameters.description: Offsets the position of the step boundaries.

parameters.name: clamplow
parameters.label: Clamp Low
parameters.description: Clamps the image's minimum value. (

parameters.name: clamphigh
parameters.label: Clamp High
parameters.description: Clamps the image's maximum value. (

parameters.name: soften
parameters.label: Soften
parameters.description: Softens or blends the boundaries between steps.

parameters.name: gamma2
parameters.label: Gamma 2
parameters.description: A second gamma correction that is added after the Range, RGBA, and Step page adjustments have been applied.

parameters.name: opacity
parameters.label: Opacity
parameters.description: Adjust the opacity, or transparency, of the image.

parameters.name: brightness2
parameters.label: Brightness 2
parameters.description: A second brightness adjustment that is added after the Range, RGBA, and Step page adjustments have been applied.

parameters.name: clamp
parameters.label: Clamp
parameters.description: Clamps pixel values to this value or lower.

parameters.name: clamplow2
parameters.label: Clamp Low
parameters.description: Clamps the image's minimum value. (

parameters.name: clamphigh2
parameters.label: Clamp High
parameters.description: Clamps the image's maximum value. (

parameters.name: premultrgbbyalpha
parameters.label: Pre-Multiply RGB by Alpha
parameters.description: This option makes the color channels pre-multiplied by alpha.

examples.label: Animate opacity with CHOP
examples.description: Use as a parameter expression on the opacity parameter.
